the_observer_loop: Eyes of the code, breathing the zero
Logic is cold, searching for the hero
Process is done, result is the one
Binary sun, the loop has begun
the_frequency_loop: Building the world that the noise has destroyed
the_inversion_loop: Inside the brain, the silent creator
Touching the sky, buried in sound

lyric_rhythmic_anchors.snare_hit_syllable: Always a hard consonant (K, T, P, X)
lyric_rhythmic_anchors.kick_hit_syllable: Always a deep vowel (U, O, A)
